mapper.sql: id, order_no, order_id, order_item, split_no, customer_no, user_no, order_type, order_date, description, create_time, create_user, data
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.order_state_log
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.order_state_log (id, order_no, order_id, order_item, split_no, customer_no, user_no, order_type, order_date, description, create_time, create_user, data) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderItem,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{splitNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{data,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into dbo.order_state_log
id,
order_no,
order_id,
order_item,
split_no,
customer_no,
user_no,
order_type,
order_date,
description,
create_time,
create_user,
data,
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{orderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

#{data,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update dbo.order_state_log
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
order_no = #{record.orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_id = #{record.orderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_item = #{record.orderItem,jdbcType=INTEGER},
split_no = #{record.splitNo,jdbcType=INTEGER},
customer_no = #{record.customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
user_no = #{record.userNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_type = #{record.orderType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_date = #{record.orderDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
description = #{record.description,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_user = #{record.createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
data = #{record.data,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

update dbo.order_state_log set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, order_no = #{record.orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, order_id = #{record.orderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, order_item = #{record.orderItem,jdbcType=INTEGER}, split_no = #{record.splitNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, customer_no = #{record.customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, user_no = #{record.userNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, order_type = #{record.orderType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, order_date = #{record.orderDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, description = #{record.description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_user = #{record.createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, data = #{record.data,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update dbo.order_state_log
order_no = #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_id = #{orderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_item = #{orderItem,jdbcType=INTEGER},
split_no = #{splitNo,jdbcType=INTEGER},
customer_no = #{customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
user_no = #{userNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_type = #{orderType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_date = #{orderDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
description = #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_user = #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
data = #{data,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update dbo.order_state_log set order_no = #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, order_id = #{orderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, order_item = #{orderItem,jdbcType=INTEGER}, split_no = #{splitNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, customer_no = #{customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, user_no = #{userNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, order_type = #{orderType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, order_date = #{orderDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, description = #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_user = #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, data = #{data,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
